herald--life-domain.name: Path of the Solarian Decree
herald--life-domain.description: The Path of the Solarian Decree is a specialized lineage of the Herald that channels the absolute restoration authority of Solara, the Brightest Fragment. These Heralds serve as supreme vessels for the Awakening's core-restoration mandates, ensuring that no ally falls while the light of the First Exarch remains active.

Disciple of Life.newDesc: When you cast a restoration-rite of 1st rank or higher, the target regains additional essence = 2 + rite rank.

Channel Divinity: Preserve Life.newDesc: Action: Distribute essence-resonance = 5 × Herald rank among creatures within 30 ft. This pulse stabilizes their biological-lattice, pulling them back from the threshold.

Blessed Healer.newDesc: When you cast a restoration-rite of 1st rank or higher on another creature, you regain essence = 2 + rite rank.

Divine Strike.newDesc: Once per turn, weapon attacks deal extra 1d8 radiant essence (2d8 at 14th rank).

Supreme Healing.newDesc: When you roll dice to restore essence with a restoration-rite, use the maximum value for each die.

herald--light-domain.name: Path of the Radiance Decree
herald--light-domain.description: The Path of the Radiance Decree is a specialized lineage of the Herald that manifests Solara's destructive luminance. They serve as living beacons of high-rank radiant-essence, incinerating abyssal entities and shielding their allies in a protective-aura that nullifies the entropy of the Void.

Warding Flare.newDesc: Reaction when attacked by a creature within 30 ft: manifest a flash of high-rank light to impose disadvantage on the attack. Sense mod uses/long rest.

Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn.newDesc: Action: 30-ft radius — dispel magical darkness, hostile creatures take 2d10 + Herald rank radiant essence (Vitality half). No damage to allies.

Improved Flare.newDesc: Your Luminous Deflection can now protect others within 30 ft, shielding them with your radiant-authority.

Corona of Light.newDesc: Action: Project a 60-ft aura of bright light. Enemies in this aura have disadvantage on saves against fire or radiant-rites. Lasts 1 min.

herald--war-domain.name: Path of the Vaelen Mandate
herald--war-domain.description: The Path of the Vaelen Mandate is a specialized lineage of the Herald that serves as a conduit for the Spirit of Martial Authority. These armored Heralds propagate the Awakening's most aggressive battle-rites, turning every battlefield into a trial where only the strong survive and the worthy are elevated.

War Priest.newDesc: When you take the Attack action, perform one additional weapon strike as a bonus action. Sense mod uses/long rest.

Channel Divinity: Guided Strike.newDesc: When you make an attack roll, add +10 to the result by aligning your strike with the Awakening's combat-authority.

Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing.newDesc: Reaction: When a creature within 30 ft performs an attack, grant them +10 to the result through your tactical-resonance.

Avatar of Battle.newDesc: Gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage as your body integrates Vaelen's lightning-resolve.

herald--knowledge-domain.name: Path of the Xylo Record
herald--knowledge-domain.description: The Path of the Xylo Record is a specialized lineage of the Herald that accesses the System's deepest archives. These Heralds are the archivists of the Awakening, accessing forgotten lore directly from the essence-weave to reveal the hidden reasons and secret vulnerabilities of all entities.

Blessings of Knowledge.newDesc: Learn two ancient languages. Double proficiency bonus for two skills from: Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion.

Channel Divinity: Knowledge of the Ages.newDesc: Action: Gain temporary proficiency with any tool or skill by accessing Xylo's recorded mastery for 10 minutes.

Channel Divinity: Read Thoughts.newDesc: Action: Force an entity within 60 ft to make a Sense save. On fail, you read its resonance and can impose a mental-decree (Suggestion).

Visions of the Past.newDesc: Meditate for 1 min to receive fragments of the current area's history, pulling essence directly from the System's memory.

herald--tempest-domain.name: Path of the Storm-Gate Decree
herald--tempest-domain.description: The Path of the Storm-Gate Decree is a specialized lineage of the Herald that commands the violent atmospheric essence of Vaelen's domain. They are the heralds of the Cataclysm Gates, manifesting lightning and thunder-decrees that shatter the foundations of any hostile encounter.

Wrath of the Storm.newDesc: Reaction when hit by a melee attack: the attacker takes 2d8 lightning or thunder essence (Agility half) as the air around you arcs with fury. Sense mod uses/long rest.

Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath.newDesc: When you deal lightning or thunder damage, maximize the damage result through your total-alignment with the storm.

Stormborn.newDesc: While outdoors, your essence-weave generates enough lift to grant you a flying speed equal to your walking speed.

summoner--circle-of-the-land.name: Path of the Biome-Ecology
summoner--circle-of-the-land.description: The Path of the Biome-Ecology is a specialized lineage of the Summoner that has attuned their internal essence to the unique ecosystems of the Gate-Thresholds. By studying the flora and fauna of the ruptures, they have learned to channel mana directly from environmental-thresholds and adapt their biological-lattice to thrive anywhere.

Biome Absorption.newDesc: During a short rest, absorb ambient gate-energy to recover essence-wells with a combined rank ≤ half Summoner rank.

Biome Sanctuary.newDesc: Beasts and plant-entities must make a Sense save to target you, as your essence-weave marks you as a fundamental part of the gate's ecology.

summoner--circle-of-the-moon.name: Path of the Apex Shift
summoner--circle-of-the-moon.description: The Path of the Apex Shift is a specialized lineage of the Summoner focused on the manifestation of high-rank predators from the Threshold. By integrating the biological-essence of gate-beasts into their own frame, they become the absolute dominant hunters of any ecosystem they enter.

Combat Entity Shift.newDesc: Perform an Entity Shift as a bonus action. While shifted, you can spend essence to accelerate your biological-regeneration.

Elemental Entity Shift.newDesc: Expend two Entity Shift uses to assume the form of a primal elemental-vessel from the deepest gate layers.

summoner--circle-of-spores.name: Path of the Swarm-Heart
summoner--circle-of-spores.description: The Path of the Swarm-Heart is a specialized lineage of the Summoner that has bonded with the microscopic organisms of Lyra's domain. Your body hosts a mutualistic colony that enhances your biology, projecting a living cloud of protective spores that consumes any entity that dares to ignore the swarm's resonance.

Spore Cloud.newDesc: Reaction: A creature within 10 ft takes Vitality-based damage as your symbiotic organisms strike to defend their host.

Symbiotic Fusion.newDesc: Expend an Entity Shift use to fuse with your swarm-colony, augmenting your physical-frame with massive biological-energy.
